violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door reach in cooler. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. NFCS must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026
The drop ceiling track in the dishwashing room is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2026
